## What this changes

A short description of the change and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes in `mcp/` (`cd mcp && npm test`)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Kage is zero-dependency by design)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Memory packets in `.agent_memory/` updated if behavior changed (`kage refresh`)
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (README / `docs/`)
- [ ] Code follows the style of the surrounding file
